localizations.title: Queen Altipia's Crown
localizations.hiddenObject_1: You need a pebble for your slingshot.
localizations.hint_1: This photo depicting Grandpa standing in front of an owl might come in handy later.
localizations.hint_111_first: Information regarding points of time in the past can be found on the back of some cards.
localizations.hint_111: You must go back a few years to learn about the beginning of Grandpa's story.
localizations.hint_134_first: To create a diversion, you need a pebble for your slingshot.
localizations.hint_134: Next to the manor's entrance, there is a boulder.
localizations.hint_11: You will need pebbles to fire your slingshot!
localizations.hint_23: This pebble can be used as a diversion.
localizations.hint_34: What can you target to create the diversion? You don't want to shoot at the guests directly, that would just draw attention to yourself.
localizations.hint_44_first: This Swiss Army knife might prove useful later on.
localizations.hint_44: It's sharp blades can be used to cut things.
localizations.hint_87_first: Upon examining both sides of the card (51), you notice scratches similar to those on the lock (87).
localizations.hint_87: To open the safe, insert the key into the lock vertically, then turn it 180 degrees.
localizations.hint_291_first: This poem will be useful later.
localizations.hint_291: Follow the poem's instructions to safely proceed.
localizations.hint_51_first: Upon examining both sides of the card (51), you notice scratches similar to those on the lock (87).
localizations.hint_51: To open the safe, insert the key into the lock vertically, then turn it 180 degrees.
localizations.hint_95: Rick has been getting in Grandpa's way ever since they were both children.
localizations.hint_76: Think carefully! You'll need to determine the amount of time that elapsed from when Grandpa started his story to when he went in search of the temple.
localizations.hint_421: Did your Grandpa really execute so many incredible acrobatic stunts?
localizations.hint_230: The map indicates you should go four and a half paces from the flag to the cross marking the treasure's location.
localizations.hint_73: The shoes can help you count your paces.
localizations.hint_97: Assemble the panorama to recreate what you see on the treasure map (M).
localizations.hint_52: Assemble the panorama to recreate what you see on the treasure map (M).
localizations.hint_551: Assemble the panorama to recreate what you see on the treasure map (M).
localizations.hint_39: As you approach the columns, you notice that they feature bright lines.
localizations.hint_643: Passing by the columns, you notice that their back sides also feature bright lines.
localizations.hint_91: To open the gate, you must closely examine the columns.
localizations.hint_84:
You need to dig at the exact spot where the treasure is.
Count your steps carefully to reach it.
localizations.hint_5: This blue stone egg is undoubtedly one of the keys to Queen Altipia's temple.
localizations.hint_72_step_1_first: You cannot open the gate without finding all the necessary symbols.
localizations.hint_72_step_1: You have encountered four important symbols during your adventure.
localizations.hint_72_step_2: After passing through the gate, you'll need to find a way to close it that doesn't require using the symbols.
localizations.hint_756: Rick and his minions are close behind you, but have not yet passed through the gate.
localizations.hint_26: There's not much you can do while you're tied up. You'll need to cut the bindings.
localizations.hint_203: Arrange the cards to form a mosaic of a face. The chalk markings around it may also be useful. This section can slide inward to reveal a passage.
localizations.hint_46: Arrange the cards to form a mosaic of a face. This section does not move.
localizations.hint_63: Arrange the cards to form a mosaic of a face. The chalk markings around it may also be useful. This section can slide inward to reveal a passage.
localizations.hint_57: If only you had something that could help you find a safe route across.
localizations.hint_2: Inside this dead end you can see a spider statue, an iron bar, a skeleton, and a small alcove.
localizations.hint_96: Looking at it upside down, the debris lies on the ground, but none of it is to be discarded.
localizations.hint_69: Looking at it upside down, the debris lies on the ground, but none of it is to be discarded.
localizations.hint_48: The grappling hook must be thrown high to ensure it is secured properly.
localizations.hint_55: Look at the statues and determine the relevant symbols based on their distinctive characteristics. You'll need to find four different symbols, not just three; what could the fourth be?
localizations.hint_37: Claire's explanation goes into detail about distinctive characteristics about each of the statues representing the kings.
localizations.hint_85: Claire's explanation goes into detail about distinctive characteristics about each of the statues representing the kings.
localizations.hint_49: Claire's explanation goes into detail about distinctive characteristics about each of the statues representing the kings.
localizations.hint_173: You can hear snoring! Grandpa has fallen asleep, and you must wake him up.
localizations.hint_4: A fish statue symbolizes the temple chamber. This was the fourth missing symbol needed for the treasure room.
localizations.hint_41_first: Carefully examine the top of the cave; you can see a cracked stalactite there.
localizations.hint_41: Use the objects you have to create a weapon capable of knocking down the stalactite.
localizations.hint_92_first: The adventurers are standing on the stalactite you just knocked down, and the background looks exactly like the one on card 41.
localizations.hint_92: By overlaying card (92) atop card (41), you will see Claire trying to reach the crown as the lava continues to rise.
localizations.hint_15: You can combine this stick with another object to create Grandpa's weapon of choice.
localizations.hint_18: The remains of the rope used to bind your hands can be used to create an object that Grandpa always carried with him.
localizations.hint_567: At the end of the adventure, Grandpa had to make a choice as to his most precious treasure.
localizations.hint_999_first: The lava is rising nearly to Claire's feet.
localizations.hint_999: Place the lava (F) on card 92, and move it so it rises toward Claire's feet.
localizations.hint_7: Grandpa must choose between Claire and the crown. What a dilemma!
localizations.hint_33: This slingshot can be used to help you make a safe spot away from the lava.
localizations.answer_hint_1: This photo depicts a bird, which is one of the symbols needed for the combination that you must enter to open the gate (72). You must also use cards 2, 3, and 4.
localizations.answer_hint_111:
Look at the back of your cards. Grandpa says that it all began 30 years ago ago.

Take the "30 Years Earlier" card.
localizations.answer_hint_134: To create a diversion, load the pebble (23) into the slingshot (11), to get a loaded slingshot (34). Then aim it at the mansion's window (red +9).
localizations.answer_hint_11: Retrieve a pebble using the hidden number (23) on card T. Then combine the pebble (23) with the slingshot (11).
localizations.answer_hint_23: Combine the pebble (23) with the slingshot (11) to load your weapon.
localizations.answer_hint_34: To create a diversion, load the pebble (23) into the slingshot (11), to get a loaded slingshot (34). Then aim it at the mansion's window (red +9).
localizations.answer_hint_44: You can use your Swiss Army knife to cut the ropes binding Claire's (red +13) and Grandpa's (red +13) hands; 44 + 13 + 13 = 70.
localizations.answer_hint_87: Place the key (51) vertically as if you were inserting it into the lock (87). Note the scratches on the front of both cards (51) and (87) create the shape of the number 9. Then, when you turn the key (by flipping the card over vertically), more scratches will align with those found on the bottom of the lock (87), forming the number 5. Together, these numbers create 95.
localizations.answer_hint_291:
To make use of the poem to get through Machine 57, follow these steps:
Stand at the bottom facing the broken statue of the monarch, ensuring you aren't touching any of the slabs. Move two slabs toward the statue. Move left, away from the ruby (representing vain riches), until you reach the edge of the cavity. Move one slab upwards to position yourself between the two fires. Move one slab to the right to remove yourself from the light emanating from the brazier on the left. Move toward the statue on the left. Move one slab to the right. Finally, go straight ahead to enter the next chamber.
localizations.answer_hint_51: Place the key (51) vertically as if you were inserting it into the lock (87). Note the scratches on the front of both cards (51) and (87) create the shape of the number 9. Then, when you turn the key (by flipping the card over vertically), more scratches will align with those found on the bottom of the lock (87), forming the number 5. Together, these numbers create 95.
localizations.answer_hint_95:
"Ever since I was a kid": You'll need to find the card that will take you the furthest back in time; i.e., 60 years ago.

Take the "60 Years Earlier" card.
localizations.answer_hint_76:
Grandpa first searched for the temple map 30 years ago. Therefore, his actual departure for the temple must have been more recent. If he left 32 years after his very first treasure hunt, that departure must have taken place 28 years ago.

Take the "28 Years Earlier" card.
localizations.answer_hint_421: You'd need to be an Olympic gymnast in order to perform such stunts, which was clearly not the case for Grandpa. This is obviously nonsense! Take the card: "But Grandpa, that's nonsense!"
localizations.answer_hint_230: Assemble the panorama using cards 97, 52, and Q. Take the shoes (73) and position the back heel of the left shoe against the flag on card 97. Next, count four and a half steps, with each step being the length of one shoe. Be sure to use the length of the actual shoes, and not the length of the card itself. Finally, use the shovel (84) to dig at this spot.
localizations.answer_hint_73: Assemble the panorama using cards 97, 52, and Q. Take the shoes (73) and position the back heel of the left shoe against the flag on card 97. Next, count four and a half steps, with each step being the length of one shoe. Be sure to use the length of the actual shoes, and not the length of the card itself. Finally, use the shovel (84) to dig at this spot.
localizations.answer_hint_97: Assemble the panorama using cards 97, 52, and Q. Take the shoes (73) and position the back heel of the left shoe against the flag on card 97. Next, count four and a half steps, with each step being the length of one shoe. Be sure to use the length of the actual shoes, and not the length of the card itself. Finally, use the shovel (84) to dig at this spot.
localizations.answer_hint_52: Assemble the panorama using cards 97, 52, and Q. Take the shoes (73) and position the back heel of the left shoe against the flag on card 97. Next, count four and a half steps, with each step being the length of one shoe. Be sure to use the length of the actual shoes, and not the length of the card itself. Finally, use the shovel (84) to dig at this spot.
localizations.answer_hint_551: Assemble the panorama using cards 97, 52, and Q. Take the shoes (73) and position the back heel of the left shoe against the flag on card 97. Next, count four and a half steps, with each step being the length of one shoe. Be sure to use the length of the actual shoes, and not the length of the card itself. Finally, use the shovel (84) to dig at this spot.
localizations.answer_hint_39: The backs and fronts of the columns on cards 39 and G both feature glowing lines. Combining the vertical and horizontal lines produces the numbers 3, 8, 9, and 5. Enter these numbers in the mechanism next to the temple entrance (91) to access the temple.
localizations.answer_hint_643: The backs and fronts of the columns on cards 39 and G both feature glowing lines. Combining the vertical and horizontal lines produces the numbers 3, 8, 9, and 5. Enter these numbers in the mechanism next to the temple entrance (91) to access the temple.
localizations.answer_hint_91: The backs and fronts of the columns on cards 39 and G both feature glowing lines. Combining the vertical and horizontal lines produces the numbers 3, 8, 9, and 5. Enter these numbers in the mechanism next to the temple entrance (91) to access the temple.
localizations.answer_hint_84: Assemble the panorama using cards 97, 52, and Q. Take the shoes (73) and position the back heel of the left shoe against the flag on card 97. Next, count four and a half steps, with each step being the length of one shoe. Be sure to use the length of the actual shoes, and not the length of the card itself. Finally, use the shovel (84) to dig at this spot.
localizations.answer_hint_5: This bluish stone egg is the key to continue advancing. In chamber 2, place the stone in the alcove against the left wall (red modifier +91).
localizations.answer_hint_72_step_1: The animals on card 1 (the Bird), card 2 (the Spider), card 3 (the Snake), and card 4 (the Fish) correspond to the combination you need to enter the gate. The numerical order of these cards matches the order in which you must enter the symbols.
localizations.answer_hint_72_step_2: Rick and his minions (N) are right behind you, trying to enter the treasure chamber. You must close the gate (72) by pulling the lever located to the right of the doorway.
localizations.answer_hint_756: Rick and his minions (N) are right behind you, trying to enter the treasure chamber. You must close the gate (72) by pulling the lever located to the right of the doorway.
localizations.answer_hint_26: Retrieve the Swiss Army knife (44) from your pocket. Use it to cut the ropes binding Claire's hands (red +13) and Grandpa's hands (red +13). 44 + 13 + 13 = 70.
localizations.answer_hint_203: Position card D to the left of card 46, and card 63 to the right of card 46, to create a mosaic face. Slide card D over card 46 until the dusty portion completely covers the clean portion on the left side of card 46. This will reveal the number 5. Repeat this process with card 63 sliding over the clean portion on the right side of card 46, and the number 7 will appear. Together, this forms 57.
localizations.answer_hint_46: Position card D to the left of card 46, and card 63 to the right of card 46, to create a mosaic face. Slide card D over card 46 until the dusty portion completely covers the clean portion on the left side of card 46. This will reveal the number 5. Repeat this process with card 63 sliding over the clean portion on the right side of card 46, and the number 7 will appear. Together, this forms 57.
localizations.answer_hint_63: Position card D to the left of card 46, and card 63 to the right of card 46, to create a mosaic face. Slide card D over card 46 until the dusty portion completely covers the clean portion on the left side of card 46. This will reveal the number 5. Repeat this process with card 63 sliding over the clean portion on the right side of card 46, and the number 7 will appear. Together, this forms 57.
localizations.answer_hint_57:
To make use of the poem to get through Machine 57, follow these steps:
Stand at the bottom facing the broken statue of the monarch, ensuring you aren't touching any of the slabs. Move two slabs toward the statue. Move left, away from the ruby (representing vain riches), until you reach the edge of the cavity. Move one slab upwards to position yourself between the two fires. Move one slab to the right to remove yourself from the heat emanating from the brazier on the left. Move toward the statue on the left. Move one slab to the right. Finally, go straight ahead to enter the next chamber.
localizations.answer_hint_2: In the dead end chamber (2), place the stone egg (5) in the alcove against the left wall (red +91). 5 + 91 = 96.
localizations.answer_hint_96: With your head upside down, the numbers are where discards would normally be. However, when you right yourself, they are at the bottom. Cards matching these values don't exist on their own, but you can combine them to form an equation: 8 x 6 = 48.
localizations.answer_hint_69: With your head upside down, the numbers are where discards would normally be. However, when you right yourself, they are at the bottom. Cards matching these values don't exist on their own, but you can combine them to form an equation: 8 x 6 = 48.
localizations.answer_hint_48: Use the grappling hook (48) on the iron bar protruding from the wall (red modifier +12). 48 + 12 = 60.
localizations.answer_hint_55: Each statue represents a king, each with a distinctive characteristic. Using machine 55, assign the symbol for fierce winds and torrential rains to the king on card (37). For the second diety (85), choose the symbol of a bird flying toward the skies. For the third diety, choose the symbol representing a father (man). The fourth symbol will represent Acatal's daughter, Queen Altipia, which can be found situated above the entrance to the temple (3).
localizations.answer_hint_37: Using machine 55, you can use Claire's description to find the first symbol you must enter into the machine: the waves and wind.
localizations.answer_hint_85: Using machine 55, you can use Claire's description to find the second symbol you must enter into the machine: the bird flying toward the skies.
localizations.answer_hint_49: Using machine 55, you can use Claire's description to find the third symbol you must enter into the machine: a man, representing a father. For the fourth symbol, you will need to find one to represent his daughter, Queen Altipia, which is situated above the entrance to the temple (3).
localizations.answer_hint_173: Grandpa has fallen asleep and must be woken up. Shake your device.
localizations.answer_hint_4: Using machine 72, the animals depicted on the cards correspond to the combination that must be entered into the gate. The animals are as follows: Card (1) features a Bird, card (2) has a Spider, card (3) displays a Snake, and card (4) depicts a Fish. The order in which you must enter these symbols corresponds to their respective numerical order.
localizations.answer_hint_41: Combine the remains of the rope bindings (18) with the stick (15) to create Grandpa's favorite weapon: a slingshot. 18 + 15 = 33. Then use it to shoot at the stalactite to knock it loose.
localizations.answer_hint_92: Place this card above card (41) so that the backgrounds of the two cards align with each other. Next, position the lava (F) on top of card 41, and slide it upward towards Claire's feet. If you look carefully, the arrangement of the cards causes the shine coming from the crown to form the letter "K".
localizations.answer_hint_18: Combine the remains of the rope bindings (18) with the stick (15) to create Grandpa's favorite weapon: a slingshot. 18 + 15 = 33.
localizations.answer_hint_15: Combine the remains of the rope bindings (18) with the stick (15) to create Grandpa's favorite weapon: a slingshot. 18 + 15 = 33.
localizations.answer_hint_567: Use machine 7, and aim your device at the grandmother on card 98. Your grandmother is Claire - of course Grandpa chose to save her!
localizations.answer_hint_999: Place this card above card (41) so that the backgrounds of the two cards align with each other. Next, position the lava (F) on top of card 41, and slide it upward towards Claire's feet. If you look carefully, the arrangement of the cards causes the shine coming from the crown to form the letter "K".
localizations.answer_hint_7: Aim your device at the grandmother on card 98. Your grandmother is Claire - of course Grandpa chose to save her!
localizations.answer_hint_33: Use the slingshot to shoot at the stalactite in the cave (41).
localizations.machine_84: "I was digging at the right spot, but found nothing. How could this be?! I was digging right where the map said to. At that moment, I heard a noise behind me, but by the time I realized who it was, it was too late…"
localizations.machine_91: "With Claire's help, we drew the proper numbers in the sand. Suddenly, we heard the gate of Altipia's Temple open…"
localizations.machine_57: "We rushed into the darkness of the next chamber."
localizations.machine_55: The center of the slab sank, revealing a smaller statue.
localizations.machine_33: The stalactite plunges into the molten rock, creating a platform upon which you can stand to avoid the rising lava.
localizations.machine_7: "Well done, that's absolutely right! I decided to save Grandma. Sadly, we were unable to retrieve the crown after it fell into the lava. As for that scoundrel, Rick - to this day I still don't know how he managed to escape. Throughout the years, he continued to try to ruin my adventures. Thankfully, Claire was by my side to help me, especially one time when I needed to disguise myself to escape from him. Have I ever shared that story with you?"
localizations.machine_72_step_1: "The gate opened, revealing what Claire had anticipated! In the distance, Queen Altipia's crown rested on a pedestal."
localizations.machine_72_continue: You gently shake your grandpa awake, but he can't seem to recall what part of the story he was telling before he fell asleep.
localizations.machine_72_step_2: "Even though we rushed to shut the gate, we were unable to stop him in time."
localizations.machine_7_early: This is not the end yet.
localizations.machine_7_error: Come on, think! Of course the crown isn't my most valuable treasure.
localizations.machine_55_intro: You are in the center of Queen Altipia's temple.
localizations.machine_7_intro: And this is when I had to make a choice…
